name: Hello WASI
description: Reference WASI plugin. Demonstrates the WASI Preview 1 ABI: WasmPluginExecutor invokes `_start` with argv [pluginID, toolName, argsJSON]; the module writes its response JSON to stdout. No host filesystem, no host env — strictly stdio.
author: Swoosh

tools.name: wasi.greet
tools.description: Return a fixed greeting via the WASI stdout channel. Useful as a liveness check that the WASI bridge is wired up.
